start.title: The Cursed Canvas
start.status_placeholder: Only English is available in this version.

intro.title: After Midnight, the Frames Began to Whisper
paragraphs: The rain had stopped by the time you reached the museum steps. You had only meant to retrieve something left behind after closing, but the last gallery light went dark before you found your way back out.
Then the doors locked themselves. Moonlight spilled across the marble floor, and somewhere beyond the central hall a frame gave a soft, impossible crackle, as if canvas were taking a breath.

A note waited on the curator's desk: the museum's paintings were losing their colors, one world at a time. If no one stepped inside before dawn, the curse would spread from frame to frame until every doorway became a wall.
You are alone in the midnight gallery, with only the whispering paintings to guide you. The first frame shimmers. The journey begins when you choose to cross it.

tutorial.title: Beginner Tutorial
tutorial.copy: Learn the command pattern, restoration loop, and quick tools before you step into an unstable canvas world.
tutorial.dialog_copy: Review the core controls and the restoration loop at any time.
tutorial.flow_hint: Use the right arrow to continue to the prologue.

sections.title: Your goal
body: The museum contains unstable canvas worlds. Each world may have lost a color, sound, memory, or object that holds it together.
Restore the worlds you enter, then return to the museum when the path feels complete.
bullets: Explore each world to understand what changed.
Talk with the artist, spirit, or guide you meet there.
Collect useful items and use them where the story points you.
Return to the museum when a world feels restored.

sections.title: Actions and dialogue
body: Use parentheses for actions. Type plain sentences when you want to talk to an NPC.
If a command does not do what you expected, try a shorter action with a clear verb and object.

examples.label: Action
examples.description: Pick up an item when it is present.

examples.label: Dialogue
examples.description: Ask the character in the scene.

examples.label: Travel
examples.description: Move between the museum and canvas worlds.

sections.title: A typical turn
body: Most progress follows a simple loop: observe, ask, collect, use, and report back.
The quick action buttons below the input change with your location and cover common moves.
bullets: Start with Look Around after entering a new place.
Ask the local character what is wrong and what they need.
Open Inventory when you forget what you are carrying.
Use Help to reopen this tutorial without spending a turn.

sections.title: When stuck
body: The game understands flexible language, but direct commands work best for concrete actions.
Your inventory, quest tracker, and location panel stay updated on the right side of the screen.
bullets: Try looking around again after taking or using an item.
Ask the NPC about the missing color, the curse, or the item you found.
If a world feels complete, return to the museum and choose another frame or path.
Save progress from the Session panel before leaving the game.

game.input_placeholder: (...) for actions, or just type to talk

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_desc: Switching the display language does not change the dialogue history in existing save slots.
settings.tutorial_desc: Show a practical guide before the prologue when starting a new adventure.
settings.tutorial_first_time_note: First playthroughs start with this enabled. Later adventures default to off unless you turn it on.
settings.tutorial_returning_note: You have already started an adventure on this device, so new adventures default to skipping the tutorial.
settings.tutorial_enabled_note: The tutorial will appear before the prologue in new adventures.
settings.tutorial_disabled_note: The tutorial will be skipped in new adventures unless you enable it again.

settings.experience_no_tokens: Experience mode has no trial tokens configured.
settings.local_model_ready_detail: The local model is available for offline play.
settings.local_model_loading_detail: The local model is prewarming in the background. You can keep playing while it finishes.
settings.local_model_unavailable_detail: The local model is optional and did not pass the runtime check or is not ready. The game will continue with DeepSeek API. To enable it, install the official Microsoft Visual C++ runtime and repair the PyTorch environment using the official PyTorch install path; do not download individual DLL files from third-party sites.

moods.tense: A tense feeling fills the air...
moods.hopeful: A sense of hope fills the air...
moods.joyful: A warm joy washes over you...

messages.opening:
The museum waits in moonlit silence. The paintings are awake, and whispers drift from behind their frames. A starry sky turns, a wave gathers, and a harbor sunrise flickers inside the mist.

You stand in the central gallery. The doors behind you are sealed by the curse. To leave, you will need to step into these changing canvas worlds and restore the colors, sounds, and memories they have lost.

Begin here: look around, or choose a glowing frame.
messages.welcome_back: Welcome back! You can continue exploring the museum or revisit the paintings. Thank you for playing The Cursed Canvas!
messages.all_restored_hint: You have successfully restored all paintings! You can return to the museum whenever you're ready. Of course, you're welcome to stay a while longer and chat with the artists.
messages.game_ending:
All paintings restored! The museum's magic flows freely. The great doors open — you are free.

You can explore the museum, revisit the paintings to chat with the artists, or click the "View Your Story" button on the right to see your adventure summarized.
messages.connection_error: Connection error. Is the server running?
messages.local_model_ready: The paintings' spirits awaken — local model is ready.
messages.view_story_desc: Your journey through The Cursed Canvas is complete. View your story!

item_descriptions.lantern: Reveals what shadow tries to hide.
item_descriptions.yellow_pigment: A bright stolen note of starlight.
item_descriptions.shell_flute: Calls rhythm back into the sea.
item_descriptions.calming_stone: A steady weight for the restless wave.
item_descriptions.mist_lens: Clarifies reflections without breaking the haze.
item_descriptions.sunrise_pigment: The orange breath that dawn was missing.
